---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the harness, schema, or documentation
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you'd like.

## Motivation
Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed solution
Describe your proposed approach if you have one.

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Additional context
Any other context, examples, or references.
